products.title: Calculus: Early Transcendentals (10th Ed.)
products.description: Comprehensive calculus textbook covering limits, derivatives, integrals, and series. Required for MATH 273.

products.title: Introduction to Computer Science (3rd Ed.)
products.description: Covers programming fundamentals, algorithms, and problem-solving using Python. Perfect for COSC 175 students.

products.title: Organic Chemistry (Morrison & Boyd, 7th Ed.)
products.description: In-depth organic chemistry textbook covering reactions, mechanisms, and lab techniques for CHEM 331.

products.title: Psychology: Core Concepts (8th Ed.)
products.description: Engaging introduction to psychological science covering perception, learning, memory, and social behavior.

products.title: Business Law Today (11th Ed.)
products.description: Covers contracts, torts, business ethics, and the legal environment of business. Required for LEGL 201.

products.title: 5-Subject Spiral Notebook
products.description: College-ruled, 200 pages with pocket dividers. Great for organizing notes across multiple classes.

products.title: Mechanical Pencil Set (12 Pack)
products.description: 0.5mm mechanical pencils with extra lead refills and erasers. Perfect for exams and note-taking.

products.title: Highlighter Set (6 Colors)
products.description: Chisel-tip highlighters in assorted colors. Ideal for textbook annotation and study guides.

products.title: Composition Notebooks (Pack of 3)
products.description: Classic black-and-white composition notebooks, college-ruled, 100 pages each. A campus essential.

products.title: Sticky Notes Variety Pack (12 Pads)
products.description: Assorted sizes and colors for reminders, to-do lists, and marking textbook pages.

products.title: TI-84 Plus Graphing Calculator
products.description: The standard graphing calculator approved for SAT, ACT, and most Towson math and science courses.

products.title: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
products.description: Expands your laptop with HDMI, 3x USB-A, SD card, microSD, and USB-C PD charging port.

products.title: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging Port
products.description: Adjustable brightness and color temperature with a built-in USB port to charge your phone while you study.

products.title: Towson University Classic T-Shirt
products.description: Soft 100% cotton tee featuring the Towson Tigers logo. Available in sizes S–XXL.

products.title: Towson Tigers Pullover Hoodie
products.description: Cozy fleece hoodie with kangaroo pocket and embroidered Towson University crest. Campus staple.

products.title: Towson Tigers Snapback Cap
products.description: Adjustable snapback with embroidered TU logo. One size fits most. Represent on campus.

products.title: Campus Laptop Backpack (30L)
products.description: Water-resistant backpack with padded 15.6" laptop sleeve, USB charging port, and multiple compartments.

products.title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle (32 oz)
products.description: Double-walled insulated bottle keeps drinks cold 24 hrs or hot 12 hrs. Fits most cup holders.

products.title: Blue Light Blocking Glasses
products.description: Lightweight frames that filter blue light from screens. Reduce eye strain during long study sessions.

products.title: Towson Long Sleeve Shirt
products.description: Lightweight long-sleeve shirt with Towson University print across the chest. Perfect for cooler days.

products.title: Principles of Microeconomics (8th Ed.)
products.description: Standard microeconomics text covering supply, demand, market structures, and consumer theory.

products.title: The Bedford Handbook (10th Ed.)
products.description: Comprehensive writing and grammar reference used across many Towson English and writing courses.

products.title: Anatomy & Physiology Textbook
products.description: Full-color A&P textbook with lab manual supplement. Required for nursing and health science majors.

products.title: Portable Laptop Stand (Adjustable)
products.description: Foldable aluminum laptop stand with 6 height levels. Reduces neck strain during long study sessions.

products.title: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
products.description: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and 24-hour battery. Great for studying in busy areas.

products.title: Mini Wireless Keyboard & Mouse Combo
products.description: Compact Bluetooth keyboard and mouse. Perfect for dorm desk setups and presentations.

products.title: Towson Tigers Sweatpants
products.description: Comfortable fleece sweatpants with TU logo on the leg. Perfect for dorm life and campus casual.

products.title: Towson University Lanyard
products.description: Durable nylon lanyard with TU logo. Holds your Onecard, keys, and USB drives.

products.title: Index Cards (500 Pack)
products.description: Ruled 3x5 index cards — great for flashcards, study guides, and note summaries.

products.title: Desk Organizer Caddy
products.description: 5-compartment desktop organizer for pens, scissors, sticky notes, and phone. Keeps your desk tidy.

products.title: Microwave-Safe Meal Prep Containers (5 Pack)
products.description: Stackable BPA-free containers with lids. Essential for dorm meal prepping and leftovers.

products.title: Over-the-Door Hooks (6 Pack)
products.description: Heavy-duty hooks that fit over any standard dorm door — hang towels, bags, and coats.

products.title: Bed Risers (Set of 4)
products.description: Raise your dorm bed up to 5 inches to create extra storage space underneath.

products.title: Whiteout Correction Tape (4 Pack)
products.description: Smooth correction tape for clean fixes on any paper. A must-have for handwritten work.

products.title: Towson University Mug
products.description: Ceramic 14oz mug with TU logo. Perfect for coffee or tea during those early morning classes.
